steps.name: Load bootstrap context
steps.prompt: Call get_context_instructions exactly once to load the bundled bootstrap rules. This is the blocking prerequisite gate (Prep Step 1). Do not call any other tool first.

steps.name: Plan execution at the task level
steps.prompt: Perform execution-level planning using todo tasks for this phase's scope. Identify dependencies and the right order before acting.

steps.name: Execute todo tasks and adopt changes
steps.prompt: Execute the planned todo tasks and adopt the resulting changes. Update task status as work progresses.

steps.name: Proceed with the assigned request
steps.prompt: Proceed with the original assigned request and its activities, following all guardrails and HITL rules.
